cards.title: Steel Torrent
cards.description: Pick one missile weapon profile — add +1 attack if every model in the unit targets the same enemy.
cards.flavor: Volleys align like a marching hymn.

cards.title: Bulwark Doctrine
cards.description: Until end of phase, selected infantry rerolls saves of 1 while wholly within 3" of another friendly infantry.

cards.title: Swift Celestial March
cards.description: One unit may run and still shoot once this shooting phase (minimum range weapons only).
cards.flavor: Storm Sigmarites skim forward without breaking ranks.

cards.title: Counter-Leap Protocol
cards.description: After an enemy finishes a charge move, one prosecutor unit may redeploy D6" once.
cards.flavor: Hammerfall Prosecutors answer aerial insult in kind.

cards.title: Draconian Denial
cards.description: Enemy ward rolls within 9" of your general suffer −1 this phase (minimum 6+).

cards.title: Hammerstrike Cadence
cards.description: Fight-first applies to one Liberator unit if it charged or was charged this phase.
cards.flavor: Anvil shields clang down on tempo.
